title: VeloraOS 1.10.6 - Notifications
releaseNotes: Adds a Notifications area with a bell and unread badge in the VeloraOS header.
New VeloraOS update alerts now appear in Notifications with a direct link to System Updates.
Update failures and active update progress can also surface as system notifications.
Preserves System Info, accounts, chats, settings, installed models, licensing, device identity and secure rollback updates.
